revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
Auto-generated page using script written by Immanuelle, either as a placeholder redirect or to make bots recognize the page as made by Immanuelle

revision.text:
{| class="wikitable" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;" |+ Navigation templates comparison {{Navbar|Navigation templates|plain=1|brackets=y}} |- ! Template ! Collapsible ! Image !! Groups !! Style (body)
parameter/s |- | style="text-align: left;" | {{tl|Navbox}} | collapsible | Left/right of body || Yes || Yes |- | style="text-align: left;" | {{tl|Navbox with collapsible groups}} | collapsible | Left/right of body and/or in each list || Yes || Yes |- | style="text-align: left;" | {{tl|Navbox with columns}} | collapsible | Left/right of columns || No || Yes |} {| class="wikitable" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;" |+ Collapsible attributes |- ! Type !! CSS classes !! JavaScript !! Collapses when !! Custom
initial state !! Nesting |- | style="text-align:left;" | [[Help:Collapsing|Collapsible tables]] | mw-collapsible | | [[mw:Special:MyLanguage/ResourceLoader/Core modules#jquery.makeCollapsible|jQuery.makeCollapsible]] | 2 or more autocollapse on page || Yes || Yes |} [[Category:Navigational box metatemplates|Δ]] [[Category:Documentation shared content templates]]

{| class="wikitable" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;" |+ Navigation templates comparison {{Navbar|Navigation templates|plain=1|brackets=y}} |- ! Template ! Collapsible ! Image !! Groups !! Style (body)

initial state !! revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:Original pages]] to [[Category:unsorted link categories]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.comment: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) to last revision by [[User:wikipedia>Izno|wikipedia>Izno]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
